_notes.input_device_substring: null = follow the Windows default recording device (系统默认 mic). Set a name fragment (e.g. "Realtek") to pin a specific mic, or override at runtime with --input-device.
_notes.output_device_substring: Must be the VB-CABLE render endpoint 'CABLE Input'. Downstream apps (Discord/OBS/recorder) select 'CABLE Output' as their microphone.
